name: Philly 3-step Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages of Philadelphia cream cheese (8 oz each),
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the softened Philadelphia cream cheese with sugar, lemon juice, and lemon peel until well combined.
2. Add the vanilla extract and eggs to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into a prepared crust. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set.
4. Turn off the oven and let cool in place. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving. Garnish with whipped cream and lemon slices. Makes 8 servings.
May also use Philadelphia Neufchatel cheese, 1/3 less fat cream cheese.
